title: Kelsey Lu – “Portrait Of A Lady On Fire”
author: Abby Jones

The post Kelsey Lu – “Portrait Of A Lady On Fire” appeared first on Stereogum.
full_text:
Portrait Of A Lady On Fire — excellent movie! That's also the title of the also-excellent new single from Kelsey Lu, whose new album So Help Me God is coming out this June (we really liked its lead single "Running To Pain"). "Portrait Of A Lady On Fire" is a cello-embellished synth ballad with a sort of sinuous, capricious vocal melody, on which Lu sings about the unsettling nature of a relationship's early stages: "Do you ever get like this, I wonder?" she repeats. Watch regular Lu collaborator Savanah Leaf's video for "Portrait Of A Lady On Fire" below.

So Help Me God is out 6/12 on Dirty Hit.
